note: Canonical fragmented/CMAF WebM bytes for a fixed synthesized VP9 input (8 frames, 2 GOPs with keyframes at frame 0 and 4; frame i has timestamp i*33333us, duration 33333us, and size 20+i bytes filled with 0x6b for keyframes / 0x42 for deltas). Produced by `new WebmMuxer({ fragmented: true })` writing an unknown-size Segment init segment + one Cluster per fragment. A byte change in the EBML header, Tracks, Segment unknown-size encoding, cluster boundary rule, or SimpleBlock layout breaks `sha256`. Regenerate intentionally only when the on-disk format changes (and record an ADR).
